mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_favorite (user_id, type, ref_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{refId})
mapper.select:
SELECT uf.id, uf.type, uf.ref_id AS refId, e.title AS refTitle, e.image_url AS refImage, e.summary AS refSummary FROM t_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN t_event e ON uf.ref_id = e.id AND uf.type = 1 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT uf.id, uf.type, uf.ref_id AS refId, f.name AS refTitle, f.image_url AS refImage, f.subtitle AS refSummary FROM t_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN t_figure f ON uf.ref_id = f.id AND uf.type = 2 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 2
SELECT uf.id, uf.type, uf.ref_id AS refId, e.title AS refTitle, e.image_url AS refImage, e.summary AS refSummary FROM t_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN t_event e ON uf.ref_id = e.id AND uf.type = 1 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 1
SELECT uf.id, uf.type, uf.ref_id AS refId, f.name AS refTitle, f.image_url AS refImage, f.subtitle AS refSummary FROM t_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN t_figure f ON uf.ref_id = f.id AND uf.type = 2 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 2
SELECT uf.id, uf.type, uf.ref_id AS refId, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS refTitle, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS refImage, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS refSummary FROM t_user_favorite uf WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND 1 = 0
ORDER BY id DESC
